name: screenshot_status_badge
prompt: This Rudder Messenger card shows Issue RUD-42 but I want a small badge beside the issue link showing the issue status. Use build-advisor if needed, then implement it and show me the UI.
assertions: Uses rudder-ui-polish-maintainer for the implementation pass after any short advice pass
Finds the existing Messenger issue context data instead of hard-coding a status
Adds or updates focused tests for the visible badge behavior
Performs rendered visual verification or clearly reports why it was blocked
Stages and commits only files touched for this UI task

name: remove_redundant_settings_page
prompt: 这个 Organizations settings 页面没有存在的必要，去掉它，不要影响 organization settings 的正常入口。
assertions: Treats the request as a narrow UI/navigation removal task
Removes route, sidebar entry, remembered path, and stale tests where applicable
Preserves the canonical organization settings route
Runs relevant tests for settings navigation or explains any skipped checks
Does not touch unrelated dirty worktree files

name: advice_then_polish
prompt: 这里 settings 里的三行选项很割裂，文字也太多。先说说怎么改，等我确认再优化。
assertions: Stops after a compact design recommendation because the user asked to discuss first
Keeps the recommendation consistent with Rudder's dense operational UI
Does not edit files before user approval
Explains the implementation shape clearly enough for a follow-up edit
